Author: meowmeowmeowie1
Name: MyTweak
Punchline: Job rotation toggles + KBM press mirror.
Description: Job rotation toggles and a keyboard/mouse action-press mirror. Includes a master kill-switch (/mytweak disable) and a movable Next Action tracker window (/mytweak tracker) showing the Single-Target and AoE actions your combos would produce right now, plus Burst ARMED/HELD for the current job. /mytweak burst hold uses per-job preset codes.
Changelog: v1.0.5.13: pulses follow each Dancer dance step again (match the game's native adjusted action, not the raw button); the Next Action tracker no longer shows a same-role job's skill (e.g. Bard/Machinist while on Dancer).
